title: Luffy’s Grief and the ASL Past: Key Exchange
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Dadan, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #19, Luffy as the scene develops across pages 12–15.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Dadan, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Sabo
dialogue.text: I'm actually pretty shocked by this.

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: The people living their aren't human.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahahaha! Man, you're one crazy guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: What? You guys should join my ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Dadan
dialogue.text: Ahh! You stole some of Dadan's booze!

summary: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Dadan, Sabo, Unknown person #1, Whitebeard, Unknown person #19, focusing on the immediate stakes of luffy’s grief and the asl past: key exchange.
